title: centaurium majus var. suffriticosum
intro: Centaurium majus var. suffriticosum, also known as the greater centaury, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and long, thin stem. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues, infections, and inflammation. The health benefits of Centaurium majus var. suffriticosum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis. Centaurium majus var. suffriticosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
